title: PMExpansion
description: This adds QoL updates and compatibility in PMWeather.
body:
This mod adds Quality of Life features to ProtoManly's Weather Mod.
Features:
Fixes lag with Xaero's minimap (0.16.0+).

Do not distribute modified versions of this jar without the express permission of the creator of this mod. You may contact him on discord: ```__ali_king_```. To make a bug report contact me via discord. **You may add this to modpacks if you like.**
